summary: Frontend-only routing restructure verification for AdSense fix. Tested all 12 features in the review request: landing page on '/', auth-aware redirects for '/', '/auth', '/forgot-password', '/home', BottomNav routing, public footer pages, and logout flow. All 23 assertions passed. Landing page renders correctly in Arabic (RTL) with hero, stats, how-it-works, features, packages, levels, FAQ, CTA, footer.
passed_tests: GET / loads public LandingPage WITHOUT auth (hero-signup-btn, hero-login-btn, cta-signup-btn visible)
Landing page renders Arabic content by default (RTL): hero 'اربح UC مجاناً', stats 10K+/50K+/100K+, 4-step how-it-works, 6 features, 6 UC packages, 5 level cards, 4 FAQs, footer
Footer link /about → public page rendered (no auth wall)
Footer link /faq → public page rendered (no auth wall)
Footer link /guides → public page rendered (no auth wall)
Footer link /privacy-policy → public page rendered (no auth wall)
Login (admin@pubguc.com / admin123) → user redirected to /home (NOT /), HomePage renders, BottomNav visible (data-testid='nav-home')
Protected route /admin accessible after login (admin user)
After logout, GET / shows public LandingPage (hero-signup-btn visible)
critical_code_review_comments: Footer links in LandingPage.js use plain <a href> tags (lines 278-281) which trigger full page reload instead of SPA navigation. Recommend converting to react-router <Link> for smoother UX. Functionality works but causes unnecessary network reload.

Multiple console errors '400 Bad Request' observed during navigation - originates from AdBanner/AdSense network calls (publisher account not yet approved). Non-blocking but expected to clear once AdSense approval is received.
Landing page does NOT render the optional language toggle (per request, this was not required). All static content is bilingual-ready via isRTL flag and works correctly.

test_credentials.note: /app/memory/test_credentials.md is missing — credentials taken from review request.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Routing restructure for AdSense fix is verified working end-to-end. Public routes: /, /auth, /forgot-password, /reset-password, /privacy-policy, /about, /faq, /guides. Protected routes (require login, redirect to /auth): /home, /tasks, /redeem, /referrals, /leaderboard, /profile, /admin, /admin/settings, /admin/packages. Auth-redirect routes (logged-in users → /home): /, /auth, /forgot-password. Logout flow tested via ProfilePage logout button — clears session and redirects to /auth.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — verification testing only, no bugs found.
